top_signals.title: China Births Two Robot Unicorns as Sector Funding Stays Strong
top_signals.summary: Two Chinese robotics startups have been valued at more than $2.9 billion in recent funding rounds, demonstrating steady interest in the sector and boosting the country’s efforts to compete with US firms like Tesla Inc. and Figure AI Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil prices rise after U.S.-Iran flareup; Qatar talks in focus
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rose in Asian trade on Monday after a weekend flareup in U.S.-Iran hostilities cast doubts over their peace deal, although both sides reportedly committed to more talks in Qatar this week. Brent Oil Futures for August rose 0.65% to $72.46 a barrel by 00:10 ET (04:10 GMT), while West Texas Intermediate crude futures ...

top_signals.title: El Niño Threatens to Deepen Crisis for Brazilian Rice Farmers
top_signals.summary: A looming El Niño is threatening to deepen a financial crisis for rice farmers in southern Brazil, where years of extreme weather have already sent costs soaring and forced the country’s top producing region to slash future planting plans.

top_signals.title: World Cup offers chance to find right broadcasting balance for fans in Japan
top_signals.summary: The diversification of broadcasting methods for soccer, such as online streaming, could be a potential for further growth for the sport.
